title: Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued July 5 at 4:33PM EDT until July 5 at 5:00PM EDT by NWS Wakefield VA
description: At 433 PM EDT, severe thunderstorms were located along a line extending from near Hadensville to near Bumpass, moving north at 10 to 15 mph. HAZARD...60 mph wind gusts. SOURCE...Radar indicated. IMPACT...Expect damage to trees and powerlines. Locations impacted include... Mineral, Gum Spring, Bumpass, Orchid, Pendleton, Beaverdam, Fredericks Hall, Locust Creek, Apple Grove, and Cuckoo.
text:
At 4:33 PM Eastern Daylight Time, severe thunderstorms were located along a line extending from near Hadensville to near Bumpass, moving north at 10 to 15 miles per hour. Hazard: 60 miles per hour wind gusts. Source: Radar indicated.

Impact: Expect damage to trees and powerlines. Locations impacted include Mineral, Gum Spring, Bumpass, Orchid, Pendleton, Beaverdam, Fredericks Hall, Locust Creek, Apple Grove, and Cuckoo.
speech_text:
Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued July 5 at 4:33PM EDT until July 5 at 5:00PM EDT by NWS Wakefield VA.

At 4:33 PM Eastern Daylight Time, severe thunderstorms were located along a line extending from near Hadensville to near Bumpass, moving north at 10 to 15 miles per hour. Hazard: 60 miles per hour wind gusts. Source: Radar indicated.

Impact: Expect damage to trees and powerlines. Locations impacted include Mineral, Gum Spring, Bumpass, Orchid, Pendleton, Beaverdam, Fredericks Hall, Locust Creek, Apple Grove, and Cuckoo.
thai_text:
เวลา 4:33 PM น. ตอนกลางวันทางตะวันออก มีฝนฟ้าคะนองที่รุนแรง ติดเส้นทางจากใกล้แฮเดนส์วิลล์ ไปใกล้บัมพาส เที่ยวเหนือเร็ว 10 ถึง 15 ไมล์ต่อชั่วโมง์ต่อชั่วโมง. ความเสี่ยง: ลมพัด 60 ไมล์ต่อชั่วโมง. แหล่งข่าว: ราดาร์.

ผล กระทบ: คาดว่าจะเกิดความเสียหายต่อต้นไม้และสายไฟฟ้า. สถานที่ที่ได้รับผลกระทบ ได้แก่ Mineral, Gum Spring, Bumpass, Orchid, Pendleton, Beaverdam, Fredericks Hall, Locust Creek, Apple Grove, และ Cuckoo.
